---
title: Recreation Spatial Diagrams
---

These diagrams describe the active spatial extension in `06-recreation-spatial.ttl`. The spatial ontology models GIS-recordable feature representations; it does not replace recreation business entities, source vocabulary concepts, or geometry instances.

## Ontology Scope

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    RECS["recs: Recreation Spatial Ontology"]
    REC["rec: Recreation Domain Ontology"]
    USF["usf: Spatial Foundation"]
    UPR["upr: Physical Realms"]
    GEO["GeoSPARQL"]

    RECS -->|imports| REC
    RECS -->|imports| USF
    RECS -->|imports| UPR
    RECS -->|imports| GEO
    RECS --> RSF["recs:RecreationSpatialFeature"]
```

## Core Spatial Contract

```{mermaid}
classDiagram
    class GeoFeature
    class SpatialFeature
    class RecreationSpatialFeature {
        <<owl:Class>>
        +sourceLayerName
        +featureGrain
        +sourceIdentifier
    }
    class RecreationDomainEntity
    class SourceConcept
    class Geometry
    class PhysicalRealm
    class SpatialPattern

    GeoFeature <|-- RecreationSpatialFeature
    SpatialFeature <|-- RecreationSpatialFeature
    RecreationSpatialFeature --> RecreationDomainEntity : representsEntity
    RecreationSpatialFeature --> SourceConcept : representsConcept
    RecreationSpatialFeature --> Geometry : geo_hasGeometry
    RecreationSpatialFeature --> PhysicalRealm : intersectsPhysicalRealm
    RecreationSpatialFeature --> SpatialPattern : usesSpatialPattern
```

## Representation Relationship

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    Entity["rec:RecreationDomainEntity"]
    Feature["recs:RecreationSpatialFeature"]
    Geometry["geo:Geometry"]
    Concept["skos:Concept"]

    Entity -->|rec:hasSpatialRepresentation| Feature
    Feature -->|recs:representsEntity| Entity
    Feature -->|geo:hasGeometry| Geometry
    Feature -->|recs:representsConcept| Concept
```

## Spatial Pattern Model

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    Pattern["recs:usesSpatialPattern"]
    Direct["recs:DirectFeaturePattern"]
    Representation["recs:RepresentationFeaturePattern"]
    Feature["all current recs feature classes"]

    Feature --> Pattern
    Pattern --> Representation
    Pattern -. available but not currently used .-> Direct
```

## Complete Class Hierarchy

```{mermaid}
classDiagram
    class RecreationSpatialFeature
    class RecreationAreaFeature
    class RecreationFacilityFeature
    class RecreationAmenityFeature
    class WaterAccessFeature
    class CampgroundFeature
    class CampsiteFeature
    class DayUseAreaFeature
    class PicnicAreaFeature
    class MarinaFeature
    class BoatRampFeature
    class FishingPierFeature
    class FuelDockFeature
    class SwimmingAreaFeature
    class TrailFeature
    class ParkingAreaFeature
    class RestroomFeature
    class VisitorCenterFeature
    class LandClassificationAreaFeature
    class WaterSurfaceZoneFeature
    class ProjectBoundaryFeature

    RecreationSpatialFeature <|-- RecreationAreaFeature
    RecreationSpatialFeature <|-- RecreationFacilityFeature
    RecreationSpatialFeature <|-- RecreationAmenityFeature
    RecreationSpatialFeature <|-- WaterAccessFeature
    RecreationSpatialFeature <|-- LandClassificationAreaFeature
    RecreationSpatialFeature <|-- WaterSurfaceZoneFeature
    RecreationSpatialFeature <|-- ProjectBoundaryFeature

    RecreationFacilityFeature <|-- CampgroundFeature
    RecreationFacilityFeature <|-- DayUseAreaFeature
    RecreationFacilityFeature <|-- TrailFeature
    RecreationFacilityFeature <|-- VisitorCenterFeature

    RecreationAmenityFeature <|-- CampsiteFeature
    RecreationAmenityFeature <|-- PicnicAreaFeature
    RecreationAmenityFeature <|-- ParkingAreaFeature
    RecreationAmenityFeature <|-- RestroomFeature

    WaterAccessFeature <|-- MarinaFeature
    WaterAccessFeature <|-- BoatRampFeature
    WaterAccessFeature <|-- FishingPierFeature
    WaterAccessFeature <|-- FuelDockFeature
    WaterAccessFeature <|-- SwimmingAreaFeature
```

## Area And Facility Representations

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    RAF["RecreationAreaFeature<br/>sf:Polygon"] --> RA["rec:RecreationArea"]
    RFF["RecreationFacilityFeature<br/>geo:Geometry"] --> RF["rec:RecreationFacility"]
    CGF["CampgroundFeature<br/>sf:Polygon"] --> CG["rec:Campground"]
    DUF["DayUseAreaFeature<br/>sf:Polygon"] --> DU["rec:DayUseArea"]
    TF["TrailFeature<br/>sf:LineString"] --> TR["rec:Trail"]
    VCF["VisitorCenterFeature<br/>sf:Polygon"] --> VC["rec:VisitorCenter"]
```

## Amenity Representations

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    RAF["RecreationAmenityFeature<br/>geo:Geometry"] --> RA["rec:RecreationAmenity"]
    CSF["CampsiteFeature<br/>sf:Point"] --> CS["rec:Campsite"]
    PAF["PicnicAreaFeature<br/>sf:Polygon"] --> PA["rec:PicnicArea"]
    PKF["ParkingAreaFeature<br/>sf:Polygon"] --> PK["rec:ParkingArea"]
    RRF["RestroomFeature<br/>sf:Point"] --> RR["rec:Restroom"]
```

## Water Access Representations

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    WAF["WaterAccessFeature<br/>geo:Geometry"] --> WAA["rec:WaterAccessAsset"]
    MF["MarinaFeature<br/>sf:Polygon"] --> MAR["rec:Marina"]
    BRF["BoatRampFeature<br/>geo:Geometry"] --> BR["rec:BoatRamp"]
    FPF["FishingPierFeature<br/>geo:Geometry"] --> FP["rec:FishingPier"]
    FDF["FuelDockFeature<br/>geo:Geometry"] --> FD["rec:FuelDock"]
    SAF["SwimmingAreaFeature<br/>sf:Polygon"] --> SA["rec:SwimmingArea"]
```

## Source Concept And Boundary Records

{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    LCF["LandClassificationAreaFeature<br/>sf:Polygon"] --> LC["skos:Concept<br/>land allocation or classification"]
    WZF["WaterSurfaceZoneFeature<br/>sf:Polygon"] --> WZ["skos:Concept<br/>water surface zoning"]
    PBF["ProjectBoundaryFeature<br/>sf:Polygon"] --> PB["source boundary concept<br/>implementation-specific"]

    LCF -->|recs:representsConcept| LC
    WZF -->|recs:representsConcept| WZ
    PBF -->|recs:representsConcept when source-backed| PB
```

## Physical Realm Context

{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    Feature["recs:RecreationSpatialFeature"]
    Land["upr:LandRealm"]
    Water["upr:AquaticSurface"]
    Interface["land-water interface"]

    Feature -->|recs:intersectsPhysicalRealm| Land
    Feature -->|recs:intersectsPhysicalRealm| Water
    Land --- Interface
    Water --- Interface
    Interface --> BoatRamp["BoatRampFeature"]
    Interface --> Marina["MarinaFeature"]
    Interface --> FishingPier["FishingPierFeature"]
    Interface --> SwimmingArea["SwimmingAreaFeature"]
```

## Source Layer Metadata

{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    Layer["source layer or feature class"]
    Row["source record"]
    Feature["recs:RecreationSpatialFeature"]
    Entity["rec:RecreationDomainEntity"]
    Concept["skos:Concept"]
    Geometry["geo:Geometry"]

    Layer -->|recs:sourceLayerName| Feature
    Row -->|recs:sourceIdentifier| Feature
    Feature -->|recs:featureGrain| Row
    Feature -->|recs:representsEntity| Entity
    Feature -->|recs:representsConcept| Concept
    Feature -->|geo:hasGeometry| Geometry
```

## Feature Matrix

| Spatial class | Parent class | Geometry restriction | Represents |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `recs:RecreationAreaFeature` | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `sf:Polygon` | `rec:RecreationArea` |
| `recs:RecreationFacilityFeature` | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `geo:Geometry` | `rec:RecreationFacility` |
| `recs:RecreationAmenityFeature` | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `geo:Geometry` | `rec:RecreationAmenity` |
| `recs:CampgroundFeature` | `recs:RecreationFacilityFeature` | `sf:Polygon` | `rec:Campground` |
| `recs:CampsiteFeature` | `recs:RecreationAmenityFeature` | `sf:Point` | `rec:Campsite` |
| `recs:DayUseAreaFeature` | `recs:RecreationFacilityFeature` | `sf:Polygon` | `rec:DayUseArea` |
| `recs:PicnicAreaFeature` | `recs:RecreationAmenityFeature` | `sf:Polygon` | `rec:PicnicArea` |
| `recs:MarinaFeature` | `recs:WaterAccessFeature` | `sf:Polygon` | `rec:Marina` |
| `recs:WaterAccessFeature` | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `geo:Geometry` | `rec:WaterAccessAsset` |
| `recs:BoatRampFeature` | `recs:WaterAccessFeature` | `geo:Geometry` | `rec:BoatRamp` |
| `recs:FishingPierFeature` | `recs:WaterAccessFeature` | `geo:Geometry` | `rec:FishingPier` |
| `recs:FuelDockFeature` | `recs:WaterAccessFeature` | `geo:Geometry` | `rec:FuelDock` |
| `recs:SwimmingAreaFeature` | `recs:WaterAccessFeature` | `sf:Polygon` | `rec:SwimmingArea` |
| `recs:TrailFeature` | `recs:RecreationFacilityFeature` | `sf:LineString` | `rec:Trail` |
| `recs:ParkingAreaFeature` | `recs:RecreationAmenityFeature` | `sf:Polygon` | `rec:ParkingArea` |
| `recs:RestroomFeature` | `recs:RecreationAmenityFeature` | `sf:Point` | `rec:Restroom` |
| `recs:VisitorCenterFeature` | `recs:RecreationFacilityFeature` | `sf:Polygon` | `rec:VisitorCenter` |
| `recs:LandClassificationAreaFeature` | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `sf:Polygon` | source-backed `skos:Concept` by implementation profile |
| `recs:WaterSurfaceZoneFeature` | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `sf:Polygon` | source-backed `skos:Concept` by implementation profile |
| `recs:ProjectBoundaryFeature` | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `sf:Polygon` | source-backed boundary concept by implementation profile |

## Property Matrix

| Property | Type | Domain | Range | Role |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `recs:representsEntity` | Object property | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `rec:RecreationDomainEntity` | Links a GIS representation to the managed recreation entity it represents. |
| `recs:representsConcept` | Object property | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `skos:Concept` | Links a GIS representation to a source-backed classification, zoning, or boundary concept. |
| `rec:hasSpatialRepresentation` | Object property | `rec:RecreationDomainEntity` | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | Inverse of `recs:representsEntity`. |
| `recs:usesSpatialPattern` | Object property | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `owl:Thing` | Declares whether the feature is modeled as a representation or direct feature pattern. |
| `recs:intersectsPhysicalRealm` | Object property | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `upr:PhysicalRealm` | Connects a spatial feature to land, water, or other physical realm context. |
| `recs:sourceLayerName` | Datatype property | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `xsd:string` | Preserves the source layer or feature class name. |
| `recs:featureGrain` | Datatype property | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `xsd:string` | Explains what one source row or feature represents. |
| `recs:sourceIdentifier` | Datatype property | `recs:RecreationSpatialFeature` | `xsd:string` | Preserves the source record identifier or crosswalk key. |
